title: Phase 1E: Shared UI - DataTable, StatusBadge, Timeline
description: Build the core shared UI components: DataTable with sorting, filtering, search, column preferences, pagination, and branch scope awareness; StatusBadge with color-coding by status enum; Timeline for audit event display.
steps: Create src/components/shared/data-table.tsx with full-featured DataTable component
Implement column sorting, multi-filter, global search, column visibility preferences
Implement server-side pagination with cursor support
Add branch scope awareness (filter by user's branch access)
Create src/components/shared/status-badge.tsx with color-coded badges by status enum
Create src/components/shared/timeline.tsx for append-only audit event display
Style all components with industrial-utilitarian aesthetic (dark mode primary)
